description: Agent-learned technology and knowledge. Wired to rulebooks and compendium. Agents with knowledge skills can append entries.

entries.title: Unified Points Sync Device
entries.text: Single source of truth for the point system. All point reads/writes flow through unified_points_sync_device. Use get_canonical(user_id), register_award(), sync_now().

entries.title: Agent Battle Skill Set
entries.text: Battle skills are applied to all agents via ensure_battle_skills_per_agent. Export for rulebooks via get_battle_skill_set_for_rulebook(). Wire to Hunters rulebook and battle V10.

entries.title: Synchronization
entries.text: Platform-wide sync mechanisms. unified_points_sync_device.record_domain_sync(domain) after writes. Domains: unified_points, users, profiles, aggregator, trophies, achievements, battle, shop, quests, leaderboards, analytics, compendium, generator, gallery, social, agent_skillsets, agent_knowledge, game, paypal, login, onboarding. GET /api/sync/status, POST /api/sync/now. Rulebook V16.
